# Research - 2026-06-28

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> 1-day delta on 2026-06-27. Sunday (day 7) -> weekly repos
> (claude-code, aider) skipped silently. Three NEW items.
> #1 (cline #11894) reserves output headroom AND targets 80% of
> trigger budget AND prefers recorded `Message.tokens` over chars/4;
> `compactConversation` (`src/core/compaction.ts:262`) does none, so
> a turn that just compacted re-compacts next turn. #2 (cline
> #11928) preserves `error.cause`; `orchestrator.ts:79` re-throws
> raw so users see `other side closed` only. #3 (kilocode #11608)
> surfaces per-routed-model usage; `costTracker.byModel` exists but
> `/cost today` and StatusBar show aggregate only. opencode #34171
> (V2Event SSE) + #34167 (empty allowlist) are sst-effect internals.
> cline #11929/#11925/#11903 vscode-only. auto-implement queue EMPTY.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 cline #11894 (~3h)**: Use recorded `Message.tokens`, reserve
  provider `maxTokens` for output, target 80% of trigger budget to
  stop the compact-every-turn loop.
- **#2 cline #11928 (~2h)**: `formatProviderError(err)` preserving
  `error.cause` name/message/code, wrapped around the throw in
  `orchestrator.ts` so transport failures stop collapsing.
- **#3 kilocode #11608 (~3h)**: `byModel` in `/cost today` + a
  top-routed-model line in StatusBar; data already collected.
- **Carryover**: claude-code dry 8 cycles, aider 31 days -- monthly
  cadence proposal below. Prior brief's three items (#11885,
  #11875, #11703) still unimplemented; ship those first.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Compaction token budgeting + post-compact headroom (config, ~3h)

- **What**: In `src/core/compaction.ts`: (a) `estimateMessagesTokens`
  (`:71`) prefers `msg.tokens.input + msg.tokens.output` when set,
  falling back to chars/4; (b) `CompactionOptions` gains
  `reserveOutputTokens`; `shouldCompact` (`:91`) computes
  `triggerTokens = maxContextTokens - reserveOutputTokens` before
  applying threshold; (c) `compactConversation` (`:262`) targets
  `0.8 * triggerTokens` -- drop additional pre-tail messages into
  the summary bucket until tail + summary fits. Tests: recorded
  `tokens` are used; reserve protects output; second consecutive
  call does NOT re-trigger.
- **Why**: `shouldCompact` compares chars/4 against the same budget
  compaction targets, so every next turn re-crosses and compaction
  runs every turn. Recorded usage is already on the messages
  (`orchestrator.ts:93-98`) -- we ignore it.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11894 (commit `e32caee`, 2026-06-27,
  `+649 -160`, `sdk/packages/core/src/extensions/context/`).
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Preserve transport error cause in provider failures (provider, ~2h)

- **What**: Add `formatProviderError(err: unknown): string` in a
  new `src/providers/format.ts`. For a native `Error` with distinct
  `cause`, return `${err.message}: ${cause.name}: ${cause.message}${code ? " (" + code + ")" : ""}`;
  for `Error` without `cause`, `err.message`; non-Error,
  `String(err)`. Wrap the throw in `orchestrator.ts:84`. Tests:
  undici `TypeError: fetch failed` + `cause:{name:"SocketError",
  message:"other side closed", code:"UND_ERR_SOCKET"}` formats to
  the cline reference; cause chains stop at depth 2.
- **Why**: A Node/undici socket close surfaces only as `other side
  closed`, hiding the fetch wrapper and code. Info is already on
  `err.cause` (`src/providers/auth.ts:10`) -- discarded on hot path.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11928 (commit `263b58f`, 2026-06-27,
  `+34 -0`, `sdk/packages/llms/src/providers/format.ts`).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. Per-routed-model usage in /cost today + StatusBar (command, ~3h)

- **What**: In `src/cli/interactive.ts:1298`, mirror the `byModel`
  block already in `month`/`all` (`:1329`, `:1355`) into the
  default `today` branch (~5 lines). In `StatusBar.tsx:48`, accept
  `topModelLabel?: string` from `getTodaySummary().byModel` -- pick
  the highest-cost entry, render dimmed next to `costStr` (`:74`).
  Tests: `/cost today` with two routed models prints two byModel
  rows; StatusBar snapshot with `{gpt-5.5: 0.04, haiku: 0.01}`
  shows `gpt-5.5` in the dim slot.
- **Why**: Auto-routing (`orchestrator.ts:21`) picks different
  deployments per turn. Without per-model breakdown the user can't
  see WHICH route is burning the budget. Data is collected, just
  unsurfaced in the two most-viewed places.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode#11608 (merge `0134fe1`, 2026-06-27;
  series `f5f9b6b` 2026-06-23 onward).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~3h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: drain prior brief first (#11875 2h -> #11885 3h ->
   #11703 3h), THEN: #2 (2h, isolated) -> #3 (3h, UI only) -> #1
   (3h, hot path).
2. **Demote claude-code + aider to monthly**: 8 and 31 cycles dry
   respectively. Patch `agent1-research-system.md` to retag both
   `<!-- monthly (1st Mon) -->`.
3. **Defer**: opencode #34171 (V2Event SSE, no effect-schema
   analogue); #34167 (router already treats absent routes as
   match-any -- `src/core/router.ts`).
